text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Look, that tree's glowing! And so is the inside of the pool! 
This is so, so cool! It's like a world of magic!!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Seriously! This place looks completely different at nighttime! 
We should invite Taishin and the others next time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! Apparently, they only light up 
the area like this at night♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet, are you sure you want to stay? 
You're not forcing yourself to be here, are you…?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm not. I thought about it 
and decided I should stay. Besides…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd forgotten, actually, but my mom sent me a swimsuit. 
She told me to go out and have fun once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …She seemed to think I needed it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (I had no idea. So her mom said the same thing…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
In that case, we wouldn't want to upset your mom! 
Let's make sure you have some fun! Hehe!
And so…

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Gah! What is this sparkly ball?! Why is it shining?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know! Let's play a game! Whoever manages 
to keep the ball until the very end wins!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea. That might be a good training exerci— 
Oh, forget training! I'm not losing to any of you if we're 
doing this!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best too! …Huh? Where are all 
these bubbles coming from?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We ran into quite a few roadblocks… 
but I'm glad everyone is having fun.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right! I'll join in too! Woooo!♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Is this really safe? Are we sure this is safe?! Is it actually okay for three people to be on this thing?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, it's a three-seater! Come on, keep your eyes 
open and go, go, gooo!♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah-ah-aaah…!
(Fwoooosh!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, oh my gosh… No, no, nooo! This is way too faaast!

text_block_list.name: Spe and Scarlet
text_block_list.text: AAAAAHHHHH!!
(Splash!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe… Ahaha! That was so scary! But it was fun too!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah… I was so scared, I thought I was a goner. Hehe.

Sparkling laughter echoes across the night pool. 
Then, at the end of the night…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahh… All I did was play, but I'm exhausted. 
I still can't get over how pretty the pool looked, 
all lit up and glittery…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I agree! They didn't have anything like that before. 
I suppose even Bubblyland isn't immune to change.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How was today, Scarlet? Did you have fun?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
…I did. It's stressful to think about how I haven't 
done any training, but…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I suppose… it's not so bad to let loose once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we have just a little bit more fun 
tomorrow before we go home, then?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Let's do it!
And when the next day rolls around…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woooo♪ It's all about the disco when you come to Bubblyland!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um, is it really okay for us to be up here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course! Dance floors are made to be danced on! Come on, get into the groove! There's no half-hearted dancing allowed here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She's right. Apparently, the most important thing 
at a disco is to let go of all your worries and dance 
your heart out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You say that as if it's easy to do either of those things…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
…No, I can't be like this. I'm here now, so I'm going to 
do it right or it's a waste of time.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm going to dance with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: M-Me too!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Hang on! Isn't that Special Week and 
Daiwa Scarlet next to Maruzensky?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Here I go… W-Wooooo! Let's dance, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Visitors
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-I can do this too… Um… T-Turn up that music, DJ!

text_block_list.name: Visitors
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Great job, you two!
